mapper.insert:
/* giftPrmtSmsMapper.insertGiftPrmtLmsTrgt */ INSERT INTO MSP_GIFT_PRMT_CUSTOMER ( PRMT_ID , CONTRACT_NUM , SUBSCRIBER_NO , SUB_LINK_NAME , SEND_YN , RE_SEND_YN , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM , JOIN_ROUTE ) WITH G AS ( SELECT A.PRMT_ID ,A.PRMT_NM ,A.STRT_DT ,A.END_DT ,A.NAC_YN ,A.MNP_YN ,A.REQ_BUY_TYPE ,A.ORGN_TYPE ,A.AMOUNT_LIMIT ,A.ENGG_CNT_0 ,A.ENGG_CNT_12 ,A.ENGG_CNT_18 ,A.ENGG_CNT_24 ,A.ENGG_CNT_30 ,A.ENGG_CNT_36 ,B.ON_OFF_TYPE ,C.ORGN_ID ,D.RATE_CD ,E.MODEL_ID ,A.PRMT_TYPE FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT A ,MSP_GIFT_PRMT_ONOFF B ,MSP_GIFT_PRMT_ORG C ,MSP_GIFT_PRMT_SOC D ,MSP_GIFT_PRMT_MODEL E WHERE A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.PRMT_ID = B.PRMT_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = C.PRMT_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = D.PRMT_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = E.PRMT_ID AND A.END_DT >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-15,'YYYYMMDD') ) SELECT G.PRMT_ID ,A.CONTRACT_NUM ,D.SUBSCRIBER_NO ,D.SUB_LINK_NAME ,DECODE(G.PRMT_TYPE, 'D', 'Y', 'N') /* 기본 프로모션은 문자 전송하지 않고 결과 바로 저장 */ ,DECODE(G.PRMT_TYPE, 'D', 'Y', 'N') ,'BATCH' ,SYSDATE ,'BATCH' ,SYSDATE ,'MSP' FROM MSP_REQUEST_DTL A ,ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST B ,MSP_REQUEST_SALEINFO C ,MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO D ,G WHERE A.REQ_IN_DAY BETWEEN G.STRT_DT||'000000' AND G.END_DT||'235959' /*신청일자 */
AND ((G.NAC_YN = 'Y' AND A.OPER_TYPE = 'NAC3') OR /* 신규 */ (G.MNP_YN = 'Y' AND A.OPER_TYPE = 'MNP3')) /* 번호이동 */
AND A.REQ_BUY_TYPE = G.REQ_BUY_TYPE /* 구매유형(MM:단말구매, UU:유심단독) */ AND A.ON_OFF_TYPE NOT IN (SELECT CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'ORG1011') /* 해당 모집경로 코드로 신청된 서식지는 M포털 사은품 Table을 통해 저장 */ AND B.ORGN_ID = A.OPEN_AGNT_CD AND B.TYPE_DTL_CD2 = DECODE(G.ORGN_TYPE,'ALL',B.TYPE_DTL_CD2,G.ORGN_TYPE) /* 채널유형 */
AND A.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY AND (NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT,0) = DECODE(G.ENGG_CNT_0,'Y',0,-1) OR /* 무약정 */ NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT,0) = DECODE(G.ENGG_CNT_12,'Y',12,-1) OR /* 12개월약정 */ NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT,0) = DECODE(G.ENGG_CNT_18,'Y',18,-1) OR /* 18개월약정 */ NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT,0) = DECODE(G.ENGG_CNT_24,'Y',24,-1) OR /* 24개월약정 */ NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT,0) = DECODE(G.ENGG_CNT_30,'Y',30,-1) OR /* 30개월약정 */ NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT,0) = DECODE(G.ENGG_CNT_36,'Y',36,-1) /* 36개월약정 */ ) AND A.ON_OFF_TYPE = G.ON_OFF_TYPE /* 모집 경로 */ AND A.OPEN_AGNT_CD = G.ORGN_ID /* 대상 조직 */ AND C.SOC_CODE = G.RATE_CD /* 요금제 */ AND C.MODEL_ID = G.MODEL_ID /* 단말모델 */ AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = D.CONTRACT_NUM AND D.SUB_STATUS = 'A' --사용중인고객 AND D.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-2,'YYYYMMDD') /* 개통일 포함 3일 경과 고객 */ AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_CUSTOMER F /* 기생성된 고객은 제외 */ WHERE F.CONTRACT_NUM = D.CONTRACT_NUM )
mapper.select: /* giftPrmtSmsMapper.selectLmsSendList */ SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM ,A.SUBSCRIBER_NO ,A.SUB_LINK_NAME ,A.PRMT_ID FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_CUSTOMER A WHERE A.SEND_YN = 'N' AND ROWNUM <= #{maxCnt}
mapper.update: UPDATE MSP_GIFT_PRMT_CUSTOMER SET SEND_YN = 'Y' , SMS_SEND_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , RVISN_ID = 'BATCH' , RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND PRMT_ID = #{prmtId}
mapper.select: /* giftPrmtSmsMapper.selectLmsReSendList */ SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM ,A.SUBSCRIBER_NO ,A.SUB_LINK_NAME ,A.PRMT_ID FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_CUSTOMER A WHERE SMS_SEND_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-2,'YYYYMMDD') /* 개통일이 10월1일 이면 SMS_SEND_DATE는 10월3일 개통일 포함 5일째되는날은 10월5일이므로 오늘자에서 2일전에 발송된 것중에서*/ AND GIFT_REGST_DATE IS NULL /* 사은품 신청일이 없으면 */ AND RE_SEND_YN = 'N' AND ROWNUM <= #{maxCnt}
mapper.insert:
/* giftPrmtSmsMapper.insertGiftPrmtMPortalTrgt */ INSERT INTO MSP_GIFT_PRMT_CUSTOMER ( PRMT_ID , CONTRACT_NUM , SUBSCRIBER_NO , SUB_LINK_NAME , SEND_YN , RE_SEND_YN , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM , JOIN_ROUTE /* 가입경로, M포털 가입자 구분 */ , GIFT_REGST_DATE , MNG_NM , TEL_FN1 , TEL_MN1 , TEL_RN1 , TEL_FN2 , TEL_MN2 , TEL_RN2 , POST , ADDR , ADDR_BJD , ADDR_DTL ) WITH G AS ( SELECT A.PRMT_ID ,A.PRMT_NM ,A.STRT_DT ,A.END_DT ,A.NAC_YN ,A.MNP_YN ,A.REQ_BUY_TYPE ,A.ORGN_TYPE ,A.AMOUNT_LIMIT ,A.ENGG_CNT_0 ,A.ENGG_CNT_12 ,A.ENGG_CNT_18 ,A.ENGG_CNT_24 ,A.ENGG_CNT_30 ,A.ENGG_CNT_36 ,B.ON_OFF_TYPE ,C.ORGN_ID ,D.RATE_CD ,E.MODEL_ID FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT A ,MSP_GIFT_PRMT_ONOFF B ,MSP_GIFT_PRMT_ORG C ,MSP_GIFT_PRMT_SOC D ,MSP_GIFT_PRMT_MODEL E WHERE A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.PRMT_ID = B.PRMT_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = C.PRMT_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = D.PRMT_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = E.PRMT_ID AND A.END_DT >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-15,'YYYYMMDD') ), PORTAL_PRMT AS ( /* M포털에서 가입한 고객 배송 정보 */ SELECT DISTINCT RD.DLVRY_NAME AS MNG_NM , RD.DLVRY_TEL_FN AS TEL_FN2 , RD.DLVRY_TEL_MN AS TEL_MN2 , RD.DLVRY_TEL_RN AS TEL_RN2 , RD.DLVRY_MOBILE_FN AS TEL_FN1 , RD.DLVRY_MOBILE_MN AS TEL_MN1 , RD.DLVRY_MOBILE_RN AS TEL_RN1 , RD.DLVRY_POST AS POST , RD.DLVRY_ADDR AS ADDR , RD.DLVRY_ADDR_DTL AS ADDR_DTL , RD.DLVRY_ADDR_BJD AS ADDR_BJD , TO_CHAR(GRT.GIFT_REQ_STTUS_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') AS GIFT_REGST_DATE , RD.REQUEST_KEY AS REQ_KEY FROM NMCP_GIFT_REQ_TXN@DL_MCP GRT LEFT OUTER JOIN MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_MCP RD ON GRT.REQ_KEY = RD.REQUEST_KEY WHERE GRT.GIFT_REQ_STTUS_DT > SYSDATE - 15 /* 추후 Data 많아질 때를 대비해서 */ ) SELECT G.PRMT_ID ,A.CONTRACT_NUM ,D.SUBSCRIBER_NO ,D.SUB_LINK_NAME ,'Y' ,'Y' ,'BATCH' ,SYSDATE ,'BATCH' ,SYSDATE ,'MPORTAL' , PP.GIFT_REGST_DATE , PP.MNG_NM , PP.TEL_FN1 , PP.TEL_MN1 , PP.TEL_RN1 , PP.TEL_FN2 , PP.TEL_MN2 , PP.TEL_RN2 , PP.POST , PP.ADDR , PP.ADDR_BJD , PP.ADDR_DTL FROM MSP_REQUEST_DTL A ,ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST B ,MSP_REQUEST_SALEINFO C ,MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO D ,G ,PORTAL_PRMT PP WHERE A.REQ_IN_DAY BETWEEN G.STRT_DT||'000000' AND G.END_DT||'235959' /*신청일자 */ AND A.REQUEST_KEY = PP.REQ_KEY(+) /* M포털 사이트를 통한 가입자 모두 추출 */ AND A.ON_OFF_TYPE IN (SELECT CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'ORG1011') /* 모집경로가 해당 코드 값일 경우 M포털 사이트를 통해 가입한 사람 */ AND ((G.NAC_YN = 'Y' AND A.OPER_TYPE = 'NAC3') OR /* 신규 */ (G.MNP_YN = 'Y' AND A.OPER_TYPE = 'MNP3')) /* 번호이동 */
AND A.REQ_BUY_TYPE = G.REQ_BUY_TYPE /* 구매유형(MM:단말구매, UU:유심단독) */
AND B.ORGN_ID = A.OPEN_AGNT_CD AND B.TYPE_DTL_CD2 = DECODE(G.ORGN_TYPE,'ALL',B.TYPE_DTL_CD2,G.ORGN_TYPE) /* 채널유형 */
AND A.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY AND (NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT,0) = DECODE(G.ENGG_CNT_0,'Y',0,-1) OR /* 무약정 */ NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT,0) = DECODE(G.ENGG_CNT_12,'Y',12,-1) OR /* 12개월약정 */ NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT,0) = DECODE(G.ENGG_CNT_18,'Y',18,-1) OR /* 18개월약정 */ NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT,0) = DECODE(G.ENGG_CNT_24,'Y',24,-1) OR /* 24개월약정 */ NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT,0) = DECODE(G.ENGG_CNT_30,'Y',30,-1) OR /* 30개월약정 */ NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT,0) = DECODE(G.ENGG_CNT_36,'Y',36,-1) /* 36개월약정 */ ) AND A.ON_OFF_TYPE = G.ON_OFF_TYPE /* 모집 경로 */ AND A.OPEN_AGNT_CD = G.ORGN_ID /* 대상 조직 */ AND C.SOC_CODE = G.RATE_CD /* 요금제 */ AND C.MODEL_ID = G.MODEL_ID /* 단말모델 */ AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = D.CONTRACT_NUM AND D.SUB_STATUS = 'A' --사용중인고객 AND D.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-2,'YYYYMMDD') /* 개통일 포함 3일 경과 고객 */ AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_CUSTOMER F /* 기생성된 고객은 제외 */ WHERE F.CONTRACT_NUM = D.CONTRACT_NUM )

/* giftPrmtSmsMapper.insertGiftPrmtResultMPortalTrgt */ INSERT INTO MSP_GIFT_PRMT_RESULT ( PRMT_ID , CONTRACT_NUM , PRDT_ID , QUANTITY , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT GPC.PRMT_ID , GPC.CONTRACT_NUM , GRT.GIFT_CD AS PRDT_ID , TO_CHAR(GRT.QNTY) AS QUANTITY ,'BATCH' , NVL(GRT.GIFT_REQ_STTUS_DT, SYSDATE) AS REGST_DTTM , 'BATCH' , NVL(GRT.GIFT_REQ_STTUS_DT, SYSDATE) AS RVISN_DTTM FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_CUSTOMER GPC INNER JOIN MSP_REQUEST_DTL RD ON RD.CONTRACT_NUM = GPC.CONTRACT_NUM INNER JOIN ( SELECT A.REQ_KEY , A.PROM_CD , A.GIFT_CD , A.QNTY , A.GIFT_REQ_STTUS_DT FROM NMCP_GIFT_REQ_TXN@DL_MCP A INNER JOIN ( /* 중복된 row가 발생해도 마지막 저장 row를 들고오기 위해서 */ SELECT REQ_KEY, PROM_CD, GIFT_CD, MAX(GIFT_REQ_STTUS_DT) AS GIFT_REQ_STTUS_DT FROM NMCP_GIFT_REQ_TXN@DL_MCP A WHERE GIFT_REQ_STTUS_CD = 'REQ' AND QNTY > 0 GROUP BY REQ_KEY, PROM_CD, GIFT_CD ) B ON A.REQ_KEY = B.REQ_KEY AND A.PROM_CD = B.PROM_CD AND A.GIFT_CD = B.GIFT_CD AND A.GIFT_REQ_STTUS_DT = B.GIFT_REQ_STTUS_DT WHERE A.GIFT_REQ_STTUS_CD = 'REQ' AND A.QNTY > 0 ) GRT ON GRT.REQ_KEY = RD.REQUEST_KEY AND GRT.PROM_CD = GPC.PRMT_ID WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_RESULT F /* 기생성된 결과는 제외 */ WHERE F.CONTRACT_NUM = GPC.CONTRACT_NUM AND F.PRMT_ID = GPC.PRMT_ID)

/* giftPrmtSmsMapper.insertGiftPrmtMPortalUsimTrgt */ INSERT INTO MSP_GIFT_PRMT_CUSTOMER ( PRMT_ID , CONTRACT_NUM , SUBSCRIBER_NO , SUB_LINK_NAME , SEND_YN , RE_SEND_YN , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM , JOIN_ROUTE /* 가입경로, M포털 가입자 구분 */ , GIFT_REGST_DATE , MNG_NM , TEL_FN1 , TEL_MN1 , TEL_RN1 , TEL_FN2 , TEL_MN2 , TEL_RN2 , POST , ADDR , ADDR_BJD , ADDR_DTL ) WITH G AS ( SELECT A.PRMT_ID ,A.PRMT_NM ,A.STRT_DT ,A.END_DT ,A.NAC_YN ,A.MNP_YN ,A.REQ_BUY_TYPE ,A.ORGN_TYPE ,A.AMOUNT_LIMIT ,A.ENGG_CNT_0 ,A.ENGG_CNT_12 ,A.ENGG_CNT_18 ,A.ENGG_CNT_24 ,A.ENGG_CNT_30 ,A.ENGG_CNT_36 ,B.ON_OFF_TYPE ,C.ORGN_ID ,D.RATE_CD ,E.MODEL_ID FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT A ,MSP_GIFT_PRMT_ONOFF B ,MSP_GIFT_PRMT_ORG C ,MSP_GIFT_PRMT_SOC D ,MSP_GIFT_PRMT_MODEL E WHERE A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.PRMT_ID = B.PRMT_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = C.PRMT_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = D.PRMT_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = E.PRMT_ID AND A.END_DT >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-15,'YYYYMMDD') ), PORTAL_PRMT AS ( /* M포털에서 가입한 고객 배송 정보 */ SELECT DISTINCT RD.DLVRY_NAME AS MNG_NM , RD.DLVRY_TEL_FN AS TEL_FN2 , RD.DLVRY_TEL_MN AS TEL_MN2 , RD.DLVRY_TEL_RN AS TEL_RN2 , RD.DLVRY_MOBILE_FN AS TEL_FN1 , RD.DLVRY_MOBILE_MN AS TEL_MN1 , RD.DLVRY_MOBILE_RN AS TEL_RN1 , RD.DLVRY_POST AS POST , RD.DLVRY_ADDR AS ADDR , RD.DLVRY_ADDR_DTL AS ADDR_DTL , RD.DLVRY_ADDR_BJD AS ADDR_BJD , TO_CHAR(GRT.GIFT_REQ_STTUS_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') AS GIFT_REGST_DATE , RD.REQUEST_KEY AS REQ_KEY FROM NMCP_GIFT_REQ_TXN@DL_MCP GRT LEFT OUTER JOIN MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_MCP RD ON GRT.REQ_KEY = RD.REQUEST_KEY WHERE GRT.GIFT_REQ_STTUS_DT > SYSDATE - 15 /* 추후 Data 많아질 때를 대비해서 */ ) SELECT G.PRMT_ID ,A.CONTRACT_NUM ,D.SUBSCRIBER_NO ,D.SUB_LINK_NAME ,'Y' ,'Y' ,'BATCH' ,SYSDATE ,'BATCH' ,SYSDATE ,'MPORTAL' , PP.GIFT_REGST_DATE , PP.MNG_NM , PP.TEL_FN1 , PP.TEL_MN1 , PP.TEL_RN1 , PP.TEL_FN2 , PP.TEL_MN2 , PP.TEL_RN2 , PP.POST , PP.ADDR , PP.ADDR_BJD , PP.ADDR_DTL FROM MSP_REQUEST_DTL A ,( SELECT ORGN_ID, TYPE_DTL_CD2 FROM ( SELECT ORGN_ID, TYPE_DTL_CD2, ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY ORGN_ID order by TYPE_CD ) ROW_INDEX FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST ) WHERE ROW_INDEX = '1' ) B ,MSP_REQUEST_SALEINFO C ,MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO D ,G ,PORTAL_PRMT PP ,MSP_PARTNER_USIM_MST USIM WHERE A.REQ_IN_DAY BETWEEN G.STRT_DT||'000000' AND G.END_DT||'235959' /*신청일자 */
AND A.REQUEST_KEY = PP.REQ_KEY(+) /* M포털 사이트를 통한 가입자 모두 추출 */ AND A.ON_OFF_TYPE IN (SELECT CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'ORG1011') /* 모집경로가 해당 코드 값일 경우 M포털 사이트를 통해 가입한 사람 */ AND A.FST_USIM_NO = USIM.USIM_NO /* USIM 값이 있는 경우만 추출 */ AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'JehuAgentList' AND DTL_CD = A.OPEN_AGNT_CD) /*제휴대리점은 유심접점이 아닌 대리점 기준의 사은품*/
AND ((G.NAC_YN = 'Y' AND A.OPER_TYPE = 'NAC3') OR /* 신규 */ (G.MNP_YN = 'Y' AND A.OPER_TYPE = 'MNP3')) /* 번호이동 */
AND A.REQ_BUY_TYPE = G.REQ_BUY_TYPE /* 구매유형(MM:단말구매, UU:유심단독) */
AND B.ORGN_ID = USIM.ORGN_ID /* USIM 제휴처 조직으로 join */ AND B.TYPE_DTL_CD2 = DECODE(G.ORGN_TYPE,'ALL',B.TYPE_DTL_CD2,G.ORGN_TYPE) /* 채널유형 */
AND A.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY AND (NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT,0) = DECODE(G.ENGG_CNT_0,'Y',0,-1) OR /* 무약정 */ NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT,0) = DECODE(G.ENGG_CNT_12,'Y',12,-1) OR /* 12개월약정 */ NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT,0) = DECODE(G.ENGG_CNT_18,'Y',18,-1) OR /* 18개월약정 */ NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT,0) = DECODE(G.ENGG_CNT_24,'Y',24,-1) OR /* 24개월약정 */ NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT,0) = DECODE(G.ENGG_CNT_30,'Y',30,-1) OR /* 30개월약정 */ NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT,0) = DECODE(G.ENGG_CNT_36,'Y',36,-1) /* 36개월약정 */ ) AND A.ON_OFF_TYPE = G.ON_OFF_TYPE /* 모집 경로 */ AND USIM.ORGN_ID = G.ORGN_ID /* USIM 대상 조직 */ AND C.SOC_CODE = G.RATE_CD /* 요금제 */ AND C.MODEL_ID = G.MODEL_ID /* 단말모델 */ AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = D.CONTRACT_NUM AND D.SUB_STATUS = 'A' --사용중인고객 AND D.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-2,'YYYYMMDD') /* 개통일 포함 3일 경과 고객 */ AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_CUSTOMER F /* 기생성된 고객은 제외 */ WHERE F.CONTRACT_NUM = D.CONTRACT_NUM )

/* giftPrmtSmsMapper.insertGiftPrmtLmsUsimTrgt */ INSERT INTO MSP_GIFT_PRMT_CUSTOMER ( PRMT_ID , CONTRACT_NUM , SUBSCRIBER_NO , SUB_LINK_NAME , SEND_YN , RE_SEND_YN , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM , JOIN_ROUTE ) WITH G AS ( SELECT A.PRMT_ID ,A.PRMT_NM ,A.STRT_DT ,A.END_DT ,A.NAC_YN ,A.MNP_YN ,A.REQ_BUY_TYPE ,A.ORGN_TYPE ,A.AMOUNT_LIMIT ,A.ENGG_CNT_0 ,A.ENGG_CNT_12 ,A.ENGG_CNT_18 ,A.ENGG_CNT_24 ,A.ENGG_CNT_30 ,A.ENGG_CNT_36 ,B.ON_OFF_TYPE ,C.ORGN_ID ,D.RATE_CD ,E.MODEL_ID ,A.PRMT_TYPE FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT A ,MSP_GIFT_PRMT_ONOFF B ,MSP_GIFT_PRMT_ORG C ,MSP_GIFT_PRMT_SOC D ,MSP_GIFT_PRMT_MODEL E WHERE A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.PRMT_ID = B.PRMT_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = C.PRMT_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = D.PRMT_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = E.PRMT_ID AND A.END_DT >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-15,'YYYYMMDD') ) SELECT G.PRMT_ID ,A.CONTRACT_NUM ,D.SUBSCRIBER_NO ,D.SUB_LINK_NAME ,DECODE(G.PRMT_TYPE, 'D', 'Y', 'N') /* 기본 프로모션은 문자 전송하지 않고 결과 바로 저장 */ ,DECODE(G.PRMT_TYPE, 'D', 'Y', 'N') ,'BATCH' ,SYSDATE ,'BATCH' ,SYSDATE ,'MSP' FROM MSP_REQUEST_DTL A ,( SELECT ORGN_ID, TYPE_DTL_CD2 FROM ( SELECT ORGN_ID, TYPE_DTL_CD2, ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY ORGN_ID order by TYPE_CD ) ROW_INDEX FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST ) WHERE ROW_INDEX = '1' ) B ,MSP_REQUEST_SALEINFO C ,MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO D ,G ,MSP_PARTNER_USIM_MST USIM WHERE A.REQ_IN_DAY BETWEEN G.STRT_DT||'000000' AND G.END_DT||'235959' /*신청일자 */
AND A.FST_USIM_NO = USIM.USIM_NO /* USIM 제휴처만 추출 */
AND ((G.NAC_YN = 'Y' AND A.OPER_TYPE = 'NAC3') OR /* 신규 */ (G.MNP_YN = 'Y' AND A.OPER_TYPE = 'MNP3')) /* 번호이동 */
AND A.REQ_BUY_TYPE = G.REQ_BUY_TYPE /* 구매유형(MM:단말구매, UU:유심단독) */ AND A.ON_OFF_TYPE NOT IN (SELECT CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'ORG1011') /* 해당 모집경로 코드로 신청된 서식지는 M포털 사은품 Table을 통해 저장 */ AND B.ORGN_ID = USIM.ORGN_ID /* USIM 제휴처 조직으로 join */ AND B.TYPE_DTL_CD2 = DECODE(G.ORGN_TYPE,'ALL',B.TYPE_DTL_CD2,G.ORGN_TYPE) /* 채널유형 */
AND A.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY AND (NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT,0) = DECODE(G.ENGG_CNT_0,'Y',0,-1) OR /* 무약정 */ NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT,0) = DECODE(G.ENGG_CNT_12,'Y',12,-1) OR /* 12개월약정 */ NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT,0) = DECODE(G.ENGG_CNT_18,'Y',18,-1) OR /* 18개월약정 */ NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT,0) = DECODE(G.ENGG_CNT_24,'Y',24,-1) OR /* 24개월약정 */ NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT,0) = DECODE(G.ENGG_CNT_30,'Y',30,-1) OR /* 30개월약정 */ NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT,0) = DECODE(G.ENGG_CNT_36,'Y',36,-1) /* 36개월약정 */ ) AND A.ON_OFF_TYPE = G.ON_OFF_TYPE /* 모집 경로 */ AND USIM.ORGN_ID = G.ORGN_ID /* USIM 대상 조직 */ AND C.SOC_CODE = G.RATE_CD /* 요금제 */ AND C.MODEL_ID = G.MODEL_ID /* 단말모델 */ AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = D.CONTRACT_NUM AND D.SUB_STATUS = 'A' --사용중인고객 AND D.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-2,'YYYYMMDD') /* 개통일 포함 3일 경과 고객 */ AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_CUSTOMER F /* 기생성된 고객은 제외 */ WHERE F.CONTRACT_NUM = D.CONTRACT_NUM )

/* giftPrmtSmsMapper.insertGiftPrmtResultTrgt */ INSERT INTO MSP_GIFT_PRMT_RESULT ( PRMT_ID , CONTRACT_NUM , PRDT_ID , QUANTITY , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT GPC.PRMT_ID , GPC.CONTRACT_NUM , PMPD.PRDT_ID AS PRDT_ID , '1' AS QUANTITY ,'BATCH' , SYSDATE AS REGST_DTTM , 'BATCH' , SYSDATE AS RVISN_DTTM FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_CUSTOMER GPC INNER JOIN MSP_REQUEST_DTL RD ON RD.CONTRACT_NUM = GPC.CONTRACT_NUM INNER JOIN MSP_GIFT_PRMT PM ON PM.PRMT_ID = GPC.PRMT_ID INNER JOIN MSP_GIFT_PRMT_PRDT PMPD ON PMPD.PRMT_ID = PM.PRMT_ID WHERE GPC.JOIN_ROUTE = 'MSP' /* 과거 데이터 영향 없도록 */ AND PM.PRMT_TYPE = 'D' /* 기본 사은품 프로모션만 추출 */ AND RD.ON_OFF_TYPE NOT IN (SELECT CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'ORG1011') /* 해당 모집경로 코드로 신청된 서식지는 M포털 사은품 Table을 통해 저장 */ AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_RESULT F /* 기생성된 결과는 제외 */ WHERE F.CONTRACT_NUM = GPC.CONTRACT_NUM AND F.PRMT_ID = GPC.PRMT_ID)

/* giftPrmtSmsMapper.insertGiftPrmtResultHistTrgt */ INSERT INTO MSP_GIFT_PRMT_RESULT_HIST ( GRP_NUM , PRMT_ID , CONTRACT_NUM , PRDT_ID , QUANTITY , RVISN_RSN , EVNT_CD , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM ) SELECT NVL( (SELECT MAX(A.GRP_NUM)+1 FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_RESULT_HIST A WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = GPR.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.PRMT_ID = GPR.PRMT_ID) , 1) AS GRP_NUM , GPR.PRMT_ID , GPR.CONTRACT_NUM , GPR.PRDT_ID , GPR.QUANTITY , DECODE(GPC.JOIN_ROUTE, 'MPORTAL', '고객 선택', '기본 사은품 자동 선택') AS RVISN_RSN , 'I' AS EVNT_CD , GPR.REGST_ID , GPR.REGST_DTTM FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_RESULT GPR INNER JOIN MSP_GIFT_PRMT_CUSTOMER GPC ON GPR.CONTRACT_NUM = GPC.CONTRACT_NUM AND GPR.PRMT_ID = GPC.PRMT_ID WHERE GPC.JOIN_ROUTE IN ('MPORTAL', 'MSP') /* 리뉴얼 전 과거 데이터가 들어가지 않도록 조건 추가 */ AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_RESULT_HIST F /* 기생성된 결과는 제외 */ WHERE F.CONTRACT_NUM = GPR.CONTRACT_NUM AND F.PRMT_ID = GPR.PRMT_ID)

/* GiftPrmtLmsMapper.insertGiftPrmtEventCodeTrgt */ INSERT INTO MSP_GIFT_PRMT_CUSTOMER ( PRMT_ID , CONTRACT_NUM , SUBSCRIBER_NO , SUB_LINK_NAME , SEND_YN , RE_SEND_YN , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM , JOIN_ROUTE /* 가입경로, M포털 가입자 구분 */ , GIFT_REGST_DATE , MNG_NM , TEL_FN1 , TEL_MN1 , TEL_RN1 , TEL_FN2 , TEL_MN2 , TEL_RN2 , POST , ADDR , ADDR_BJD , ADDR_DTL ) SELECT DISTINCT A.PROM_CD , D.CONTRACT_NUM , D.SUBSCRIBER_NO , D.SUB_LINK_NAME , 'Y' , 'Y' , 'BATCH' , SYSDATE , 'BATCH' , SYSDATE , 'MPORTAL' , TO_CHAR(A.GIFT_REQ_STTUS_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') , C.DLVRY_NAME , C.DLVRY_MOBILE_FN , C.DLVRY_MOBILE_MN , C.DLVRY_MOBILE_RN , C.DLVRY_TEL_FN , C.DLVRY_TEL_MN , C.DLVRY_TEL_RN , C.DLVRY_POST , C.DLVRY_ADDR , C.DLVRY_ADDR_BJD , C.DLVRY_ADDR_DTL FROM NMCP_GIFT_REQ_TXN@DL_MCP A , MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP B , MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_MCP C , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO D , NMCP_EVENT_CODE_MST@DL_MCP E WHERE A.REQ_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND B.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND B.CONTRACT_NUM = D.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.EVNT_CD_PRMT IS NOT NULL /*이벤트 코드가 적용된 고객 */ AND B.EVNT_CD_PRMT = E.ECP_SEQ AND A.GIFT_REQ_STTUS_DT > SYSDATE - 15 AND D.SUB_STATUS = 'A' --사용중인고객 AND D.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-2,'YYYYMMDD') /* 개통일 포함 3일 경과 고객 */ AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_GIFT_PRMT_CUSTOMER F /* 기생성된 고객은 제외 */ WHERE F.CONTRACT_NUM = D.CONTRACT_NUM )
